meaning: n.跋涉者,涉禽类,钓鱼用的防水长靴
examples: "All these wader and water birds have very similar feet, " Lockley.
My dad always wears his wader and fishing vest when he goes fishing.
The hand line may be a useful aid even if the wader is belayed as below.
You seemed to take a great deal of self-satisfaction from every macho wader-clad plunge into the river, with live reporting from the eye of the storm.
He was a gutsy, witty wader into the fray.
